summary: Completed final comprehensive testing of Mock Testing Suite v2.5.0. All specified features verified and working correctly including backend APIs, frontend UI, version display, navigation, Discord functionality, Help documentation, Settings tabs, and Electron desktop app structure.
passed_tests: Backend APIs - All 7 endpoints working (100% success rate): settings, defaults, session, history, ticker, summaries
Frontend - Home page loads with logo, stats, 3 styled buttons, recent sessions - no scrolling needed at 1280x800
Frontend - Basics page has headset vertical layout, pronouns helper text, auto-fail buttons with tooltips
Frontend - Calls page has scenario card with Thank You Gift, coaching validation, scroll-to-top on next call
Frontend - Sup Transfer page has correct scenario grammar, randomized variables, coaching validation
Frontend - Settings has 10 tabs reordered (General first, Discord last), Discord screenshots section
Frontend - Help page has 5 tabs with comprehensive documentation, Support tab with email/Discord
Frontend - Discord popup with Templates + Screenshots tabs, search working
Frontend - Sidebar has ACD logo, emoji icons, colored action buttons, Sheets conditional display
Frontend - Version v2.5.0 shown consistently in sidebar and status bar
Backend - Ticker fetches from Google Doc (not default messages)
All navigation between pages working correctly
All data-testids present for robust automated testing
Electron desktop app structure verified in files
